one_liner: An editorial-almanac website for a 90-year-old cooperative credit union, foregrounding governance, member voice, and tangible community lending — with a warm olive/terracotta/cream palette and scratchboard motifs.
site_goal: Differentiate a 90-year-old credit union from commercial regional banks by foregrounding cooperative governance, member voting, community lending stories, and modern self-service tools — all in an almanac-style editorial frame.

metadata.motif: engraved scratchboard spot illustrations + horizontal ledger-stripe banding

typography.headlines: Cooper-adjacent rounded humanist serif (Cooper Black, Bookman Old Style, Georgia fallback)
typography.body: Nunito / Quicksand / system rounded humanist sans
typography.figures: ui-monospace / SF Mono / Menlo — 'honest accounting' style

motifs: Horizontal olive ledger-stripe banding dividing each page into chapters
Terracotta Roman numerals as chapter markers (I. II. III. ...)
Inline SVG scratchboard engravings (bridge, wheat, river logo, board portraits, tool icons)
Faint engraved-line texture on cream body background
Chip-style badges and trust marks rendered as engraved circles
Annual report PDFs as 'ledger spines' in a year grid
Marginalia footnotes in a terracotta-bordered narrow column
design.layout: Asymmetric two-column broadsheet inside a max-1180px wrapper; sticky outline rails; ledger-stripe full-bleed bands separating major sections.

pages.title: Almanac
pages.layout_pattern: Almanac cover with engraved bridge SVG, founding-year terracotta callout, ledger stripe of figures, then four Chapter sections (I Services, II Community Lending, III Governance, IV Reading Room), member-voice testimonial.
sections_implemented: Almanac cover hero (Est. 1936, bridge engraving, mission, 'One member, one vote.')
Ledger stripe: 4.35% dividend / 84,217 members / 31 branches
Chapter I — Services overview (three tier cards)
Chapter II — Community lending (four anonymized recent loans funded)
Chapter III — Governance with live countdown + ballot-open chip
Chapter IV — Reading Room (three featured articles, Issue 109)
Member Voices long-form testimonial
Footer with full seven Rochdale Principles and NCUA / Equal Housing badges

pages.title: Services Index
pages.layout_pattern: Tiered services index with sticky outline rail and four ledger-stripe tier bands (Personal, Borrowing, Business, Cooperative).
sections_implemented: Sticky left-rail outline (I–VI) with live scrollspy
Personal tier — 6-product typographic table with monospaced rates
Borrowing tier — 6 products incl. credit-builder loan
Business tier — operating accounts, SBA, CRE, agriculture
Cooperative lending tier — co-op startup, worker-owned conversion, community solar, CLT mortgage
Glossary marginalia (APR vs APY, share vs deposit, dividend vs interest, patronage refund)
'Not sure where to start?' guided-help launcher with form

pages.title: Calculator Workshop
pages.layout_pattern: Six bordered tool-bench cards in a 3×2 grid, each with a scratchboard engraving icon. Selecting a card expands a two-column input/result panel inline with a 'Print this estimate' button.
sections_implemented: Mortgage payment calculator (P&I + taxes + insurance + PMI, fully live)
Auto loan + refi savings (compares two rates and projects total savings)
Debt consolidation (current vs new monthly payment)
Savings goal projector (iterative simulation, returns months / years to goal)
HELOC draw period (credit-line and interest-only monthly)
Amortization schedule (first 12 months rendered live in a table)
Print-to-PDF on every calculator (window.print)
Assumptions / disclosures sidebar and schedule-a-lender CTA

pages.title: Find Us
pages.layout_pattern: Tabbed locator with regional vector SVG map (three states, three rivers, terracotta pins) plus right-side branch list grouped by Upper/Middle/Lower basin. ATM heatmap and service filter tabs.
sections_implemented: Hand-drawn SVG regional map with state outlines, three river curves, 12 branch pins
Branch list grouped by basin with expandable <details> entries (hours, services, manager, archive note, opened year)
ATM heatmap SVG with radial blobs over Linfield / Riverbend / Estuary / Hatcher
Shared-branching explainer card
Holiday-hours banner
Filter panel (drive-thru, notary, safe-deposit, Saturday hours) with weather-closure subscription

pages.title: Governance
pages.layout_pattern: Civic-style page with annual-meeting RSVP and live countdown, board portraits, member-authenticated ballot card with terracotta 'BALLOT OPEN' chip, bylaws library, member-proposal form, and a 30-year annual report 'spine' archive.
sections_implemented: Annual meeting RSVP card with countdown timer (June 14 2026)
Board-of-directors gallery (6 directors with SVG portrait abstractions, terms, committees, statements; 3 marked UP FOR ELECTION)
Member-authenticated board ballot panel (terracotta band, sign-in CTA)
Bylaws & policies library (6 PDF cards)
Member proposals submission form
Annual report archive grid (1996 – 2025 as ledger spines)
Long-form Seven Rochdale Principles explainer

pages.title: The Reading Room
pages.layout_pattern: Periodical-style editorial blog. Olive-deep cover with monthly wheat-sheaf illustration and ToC. Broadsheet two-column feature with drop cap. Sidebar carries Loans-at-Work, sponsorship news, scholarships, mail-subscribe. Past-issue carousel below.
sections_implemented: Periodical cover: Issue No. 109, May 2026, wheat-sheaf SVG, table-of-contents
Lead feature (broadsheet two-column with drop cap + marginalia footnote)
Loans-at-Work sidebar profile (Northbridge Print Coop)
Sponsorship news ticker (4 entries)
2026 scholarship recipients note
Subscribe-by-mail print newsletter form
Two additional features (debt-collector timeline, farm succession)
Past issues archive carousel (12 issues, scroll-snap with prev/next buttons)

pages.title: Sign In
pages.layout_pattern: Two-column auth: left bordered cream login card with double-bordered engraved frame, right column with weekly fraud-team security note and engraved-circle trust marks. Tabs swap Personal / Business banking forms.
sections_implemented: Personal login form (member number / password / trust device / MFA continuation)
Business banking tab with hardware-token field + treasury features list
Forgot username/password and first-time enrollment launchers
Security note of the week (lost-package SMS scam, with byline)
Fraud-alert subscription toggles (live status text)
Engraved-circle trust-mark row (NCUA / MFA / TLS 1.3)
24/7 fraud hotline call-out band

interactions_implemented: Six live calculators with full math (mortgage, auto+refi, debt, savings, HELOC, amortization)
Live countdown timer to the annual meeting (home + governance)
Tabbed UI on Find Us (branches/ATMs/filters) and Sign In (personal/business)
Scrollspy on the services outline rail
Expandable branch <details> entries grouped by river basin
Past-issues scroll-snap carousel with prev/next controls
Fraud-alert subscription toggle with live state
Multiple form 'submit' handlers showing acknowledgement notes (RSVP, proposal, subscribe, request callback)

tech.css: One shared stylesheet, custom properties, no preprocessors
tech.js: Vanilla ES2015+, ~270 lines, no frameworks, no build tooling
tech.assets: All illustrations are inline SVG (no external images downloaded)

audience: Multi-generational members across the three-state region
Small farmers and ag businesses in succession planning
Long-time members participating in board elections
